items.name: use-async
items.description: A hook that owns the async action lifecycle — loading state, success, error, and settled callbacks

items.name: async-button
items.description: A button that performs async operations with a no-layout-shift loading state

items.name: async-scope
items.description: A coordination layer for async UI — decouple what fires an action from what reacts to it.

items.name: confirm-action
items.description: A confirmation dialog that wraps an async action with loading state

items.name: use-debounce
items.description: A debounce hook that returns a stable { execute, cancel } object — safe to call without wrapping in useCallback

items.name: use-controlled-state
items.description: Uncontrolled/controlled state bridge — use like useState but accepts optional value and onChange props for full controlled mode support

items.name: combobox
items.description: A single-select combobox with inline search, async loading support, and full controlled/uncontrolled API

items.name: input-group
items.description: Compose inputs with inline addons, buttons, and labels in a styled container

items.name: multi-select
items.description: A multi-select combobox with inline search, toggle-based selection, and full controlled/uncontrolled API

items.name: password-input
items.description: A password input with show/hide toggle and an optional strength indicator
